hero.title: The Group Trip Planner That Brings Everyone Together
hero.description: Plan trips with friends or family in one shared space. Build your itinerary day by day, vote on activities, track your group budget, and get ready to travel — no more scattered chats or messy spreadsheets.

worldSection.title:
Group Travel Planning
Made Simple
worldSection.description:
From the streets of Lisbon to the temples of Kyoto, WePlanify helps your group turn travel ideas into a clear, stress-free itinerary.

• Build a day-by-day group itinerary
• Manage your shared travel budget
• Vote on destinations, activities & restaurants
• Create shared packing lists and assign tasks
